text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 18 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Ave, Ave verum corpus
Natum de Maria Virgine
Vere passum, immolatum
In cruce pro homine
Cuius latus perforatum
Unda fluxit et sanguine
Esto nobis praegustatum
In mortis examine
In mortis examine
